channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: NRA prepares lawsuit against Maryland's new 'Glock ban'
item.description: The National Rifle Association on Tuesday prepared a legal challenge to Maryland's ban on the sale of Glock firearms, a new law signed by Gov. Wes Moore.

item.title: Christian Menefee defeats Al Green in Democratic primary in redrawn 18th House District in Texas
item.description: Rep. Christian Menefee won the Democratic primary for Texas's 18th House District, defeating incumbent Rep. Al Green.

item.title: Beijing's Disposable Operatives
item.description: The Chinese Communist Party runs its overseas agents on the cheap, abandoning them when they are caught.

item.title: Ken Paxton unseats John Cornyn in latest blowout defeat for establishment GOP
item.description: The race was widely seen as a referendum on establishment Republicans' reluctance to secure wins like the Save America Act.
